# Dumbo Health

Dumbo Health is a telehealth company specializing in sleep apnea diagnosis and treatment. We make it easy for people to get tested, diagnosed, and treated from home — without the hassle of traditional sleep labs or in-person appointments.

## What We Do

- **At-Home Sleep Test** — FDA-cleared home sleep apnea test kit with doctor interpretation and a follow-up telehealth consultation. Results in days, not weeks. https://www.dumbo.health/at-home-sleep-test
- **CPAP Therapy** — CPAP setup, titration support, and ongoing care managed by our licensed clinicians. Equipment shipped directly to your door. https://www.dumbo.health/cpap
- **Ongoing Sleep Care** — Continuous follow-up, mask fitting guidance, and treatment optimization through our telehealth platform. https://www.dumbo.health/solutions
- **CPAP Resupply** — Automatic resupply of CPAP masks, filters, and accessories on your schedule. https://www.dumbo.health/solutions

## Key Resources

- Solutions overview: https://www.dumbo.health/solutions
- Sleep apnea facts and education: https://www.dumbo.health/resources/facts
- Sleep health blog: https://www.dumbo.health/blog
- FAQs: https://www.dumbo.health/faqs
- About us: https://www.dumbo.health/about-us

## Who We Help

People who snore loudly, feel tired despite a full night's sleep, struggle to focus, or have been told they stop breathing at night. Sleep apnea affects an estimated 39 million Americans, and 80% remain undiagnosed. Dumbo Health serves patients across the United States via telehealth.
